source_files.description: Original uploaded real Warp lane dataset — 2,000 city-pair rows
Parsed version of seed CSV with split origin/destination fields
Deduplicated canonical lane registry — unique origin→destination pairs with slugs
Enriched lane registry with coordinates, corridors, distances, modes, and spec-required fields

notes: Using uploaded real-lane file (warp_top_2000_lanes_seed.csv) as sole source of truth
2,000 raw lanes → 1,220 unique canonical lanes after deduplication
No synthetic lanes generated — only real Warp network lanes
51 unique metros identified across the lane network
